name: Hominy-Chili Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can sliced ripe olives (drained and divided into two)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chili and half of the olives; spoon into a lightly greased 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
2. Top with onion and hominy.
3. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
4. Sprinkle with cheese and remaining olives.
5. Bake an additional 5 minutes.
